source: scripts/agentic/design-reference-capture.ts --screen notes (protocol captureScreenshot, hiDpi, target kind=notes; SCRIPT_KIT_TEST_NOTES_DB_PATH sandbox pins default 350x280 bounds)
motion: static (no fx shader layer in the Notes window)
backdrop: user's live desktop (NOT the synthetic fixture backdrop)
colorProfile: recorded-at-capture (heading/list-marker hue drifts warm vs stock #FBBF24; heading marker reads dimmer than stock resolved white — same non-blocking class as confirmCapture.stockThemeVsReferenceRaster)

fixture.markdown:
# Design Contract Notes

Track every painted value in
the Notes window.

- Titlebar 36 px
- Editor 16 px mono, 20 px line
- Footer buttons hug
fixture.state: rest (window not hovered: title 0.7, footer 0.5), one note selected, caret at end, save flash elapsed (>1.6s settle)
fixture.footerButtons: Notes ⌘P · Actions ⌘K · Agent ⌘↵ (in-window GPUI strip, 32px band)

pixelReceipts.softWrap: '- Editor 16 px mono, 20 px line' wraps 'line' onto its own visual row (9 painted rows for 8 logical lines)
pixelReceipts.note: footer band paints 32pt at the window bottom while NotesLayoutMetrics reserves 28 - see notesFooter.layoutReservationVsIntrinsicPaint
